verification.backend_targeted: passed: ENVIRONMENT=test FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID=wordpack-ci GCP_PROJECT_ID=wordpack-ci ADMIN_EMAIL_ALLOWLIST=test@example.com SESSION_SECRET_KEY=<test-only random 32+ chars> PYTHONPATH=apps/backend pytest -q --no-cov tests/backend/test_architecture_boundaries.py tests/backend/test_word_regenerate_async.py tests/backend/test_quiz_generation_jobs.py tests/backend/test_word_router_package.py tests/backend/test_quiz_api.py
verification.backend_full: passed: FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID=wordpack-ci GCP_PROJECT_ID=wordpack-ci ADMIN_EMAIL_ALLOWLIST=test@example.com SESSION_SECRET_KEY=<test-only random 32+ chars> PYTHONPATH=apps/backend pytest -q --no-cov
verification.frontend_typecheck: passed: cd apps/frontend && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json
verification.frontend_build: passed: cd apps/frontend && npm run build
verification.playwright_smoke: passed: npx playwright test -c tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts tests/e2e/guest.spec.ts tests/e2e/wordpack.spec.ts

notes: origin/main is used as base because local main is checked out by another worktree.
No user-visible UI behavior change is intended; frontend changes route existing calls through feature/shared adapters.
